purpose: PreviewPage participates in the preview workspace. It coordinates the Electron-backed web preview, injected overlay edit requests, and preview state so users can inspect or interact with a running target app from the Synapse code surface.
gotchas: Preview features rely on Electron services and injected overlay messaging; renderer code must tolerate unavailable preview sessions.
patterns: Functional React component with hooks for local state/effects and Electron API calls isolated behind window.electronAPI.
Page-directory organization separates high-level page shells from nested component, style, and index modules.
conventions: Renderer components use .jsx extensions, PascalCase component names, and @ alias imports for src/ui modules.
